zh: 100% 碳纤维制造，彻底消除湿度/温度影响
无需打磨维护，几乎不变形
适配多种接牙规格，可搭配其他品牌后把
en: 100% carbon fiber construction eliminates humidity/temperature effects
Multiple joint options for compatibility with other brand butts

suitable_for.zh: 所有想要升级前节的玩家。不想换整根杆但想要顶级性能的选手，或者想尝试碳纤维手感的木杆用户。
suitable_for.en: Any player looking to upgrade their shaft. Perfect for those who want top-tier performance without changing their entire cue, or wood cue users curious about carbon fiber feel.

review.zh: REVO 是 Predator 的核心技术产品，也是目前市面上认知度最高的碳纤维前节。相比木质前节，REVO 最大的优势在于一致性——不受环境变化影响，不需要经常打磨维护，偏转值始终保持稳定。12.4mm 更适合需要精准加塞的选手，12.9mm 则提供更大的甜点区域。唯一的争议点是手感：部分传统木杆爱好者认为碳纤维的反馈偏'硬'，但这纯属个人偏好问题。
review.en: REVO is Predator's flagship technology product and the most recognized carbon fiber shaft on the market. Its greatest advantage over wood shafts is consistency — unaffected by environmental changes, requiring minimal maintenance, with deflection values remaining stable. The 12.4mm suits players needing precise english, while the 12.9mm offers a larger sweet spot. The only debate is feel: some traditional wood cue enthusiasts find the carbon feedback 'hard', but this is purely personal preference.
